title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 80
raw_text:
Well, I got to sign off because we have to replace all the cat boxes in the
house now; the cats are grumbling, and when Chester grumbles, we all move
into action.
Love,
Phil
 
➊ Astraea, or Justice, the last immortal to leave the Earth in the legend of
the Saturnian age.
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
